MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-04-2021 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY JOHN C. LAURITSEN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE; EDWIN SCHYOCK, ESQ. FOR CROSS DEFENDANTS JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILDREN'S SERVICES AND MOLLY HILL -- PLAINTIFF FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGES' MOTION TO VACATE OR CONTINUE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/10/22 IS CONTINUED TO 7/25/22 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY AND STATUTORY DEADLINES ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. MR. LAURITSEN TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO PAY $60.00 VIA E-FILING FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT PLAINTIFFS WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
